intro: Phenax ballotifolius, also known as Ballota, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and native to the Mediterranean region. The health benefits of Phenax ballotifolius include its ability to act as an expectorant, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and its potential anti-inflammatory properties, which may aid in reducing pain and inflammation. The bioactive constituents of this plant include essential oils, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
